title: Browser-to-daemon migration bundle (HELM-PHASE3-BUILD-SPEC.md P3-D10, P3-M7)
description: Export format for origin-bound browser-mode state (OPFS journal cache + PRF-wrapped vault) that a user carries from ainumbers.co to a freshly installed helmd. helmd only imports a bundle AFTER it has proven itself to the browser via the signed-challenge probe (P3-D9) and a fresh WebAuthn assertion has been taken (P3-M7) — this schema validates the bundle's shape only, not the import-time proof sequence. vault_export never carries a raw DEK or PRF secret, only the wrapped/encrypted blob plus enough KDF metadata for the daemon-side unwrap to run.

wrapped_dek.description: Base64 ciphertext of the journal DEK under the wrap method's derived key. Never the DEK itself, never a PRF output, never a passphrase.

daemon_proof_required.description: Fixed true — a bundle importer that skipped the signed-challenge proof step is a contract violation, not a schema variant (P3-D9).
